$comment: Configuration for d2r-multi-export export pipeline. Edit these instead of modifying code.
$skippedCubeRecipesNote: Mirrors doc-generator's hardcoded cube skip rules. Use 'value' for exact match, or 'valueMin'/'valueMax' (inclusive) for ranges.
$ignoredPropertyCodesNote: Property codes silently dropped from the export (formerly hardcoded in PropertyMapper).
$magicNameOverridesNote: Base item NameStr → magic-quality name key (e.g. 'aqv' Arrows → 'z01' Magic Arrows).
$validRequiredClassNamesNote: English class names accepted as RequiredClass when resolved from Equiv2. Treated as a literal pass-through into KeyedEquipment.RequiredClass on the wire.
$skippedAutoMagicGroupsNote: AutoMagic.txt group ids skipped wholesale during keyed export.
$propertyPostCalcFilteredCodesNote: Stat codes stripped from the property list AFTER DamageArmorCalculator has consumed them (formerly hardcoded in PropertyMapper.PostCalcFilter).
$propertyStatOverridesNote: Stat-name remapping for property codes whose Properties.txt entry doesn't list a stat or lists the wrong one (formerly hardcoded in PropertyMapper.StatOverrides).
$propertyPriorityOverridesNote: Display-priority overrides for property codes whose stat has no descpriority in ItemStatCost (formerly hardcoded in PropertyMapper.PriorityOverrides).
$customSkillTabAliasesNote: Mod-added property codes that act as a class-restricted random skill tab (`+N Random Skill Tab (<Class> Only)`) but have no row in `properties.txt`. Maps the property code to a 3-letter CharStats class code; the resolver routes it through the same path as `tab-rand` with the class fixed. Mirrors the doc-generator's hardcoded Wraithstep workaround.
$propertyElementalExpansionsNote: Multi-stat elemental properties expanded into separate min/max/len entries so MergeElementalTriplets can aggregate them (formerly hardcoded in PropertyMapper.ElementalExpansions).
$elementalDamagePairsNote: Elemental min/max pairings used by PropertyCleanup.MergeElementalTriplets (formerly hardcoded in PropertyCleanup.ElementalPairs). The element label is raw English used only as an internal discriminator, not on the wire.
$splitElementalCodesNote: Min/max/len elemental damage codes that ItemStatCost typically renders as bare numbers (formerly hardcoded in PropertyCleanup.SplitElementalCodes). Must survive UniqueImporter's bare-int filter so MergeElementalTriplets can aggregate them.
$propertyMergeBlocklistNote: Property codes that must NOT be merged across rows even when their (PropertyCode, Parameter) match (formerly hardcoded as `neverMerge` inside PropertyCleanup.CleanupDuplicates). `rip`/`randclassskill`/`skill-rand` carry distinct random-skill pools; `dmg%` is intentionally additive across multiple rolls.
$cubeGrabberSentinelsNote: Early-stop sentinel codes for CubeMain.txt (formerly hardcoded in CubeRecipeImporter.GrabberSentinels). Once Input1 and Output both fall in this set the importer enters skip-but-continue mode.
$cubeSocketPunchNote: Post-sentinel allow-list for the socket-punch carve-out (formerly hardcoded in CubeRecipeImporter.SocketPunchEquipTokens / SocketPunchJewelQualities). Helm/Torso/Shield/Weapon + jewel × {mag|rar|uni} → useitem with Mod1 = sock.
$cubeIngredientLabelsNote: Raw English labels for cube ingredient/output qualifier tokens (formerly hardcoded in CubeRecipeImporter.InputDisplay / OutputDisplay). AGENTS.md documented exception #1 (cube recipe content ships raw English by design); only the storage location is JSON. Editing these does NOT need a code change.
